# Formula Sheet

## Geometry and vectors

$$
|v|=\sqrt{v_1^2+\cdots+v_n^2}, \qquad d(a,b)=|a-b|.
$$

$$
u\cdot v=|u||v|\cos\theta, \qquad {\rm proj}_v u=\frac{u\cdot v}{v\cdot v}v.
$$

A line has the form

$$
r(t)=p+tv.
$$

A plane has the form

$$
n\cdot (x-p)=0.
$$

## Differentiation

$$
\nabla f=\langle f_{x_1},\dots,f_{x_n}\rangle.
$$

$$
D_u f(a)=\nabla f(a)\cdot u.
$$

First-order approximation:

$$
f(a+h)\approx f(a)+\nabla f(a)^T h.
$$

Second-order approximation:

$$
f(a+h)\approx f(a)+\nabla f(a)^T h+\frac12 h^T H_f(a)h.
$$

## Integration

$$
\iint_R f(x,y)\,dA, \qquad \iiint_E f(x,y,z)\,dV.
$$

Polar coordinates:

$$
x=r\cos\theta, \qquad y=r\sin\theta, \qquad dA=r\,dr\,d\theta.
$$

Spherical coordinates:

$$
dV=\rho^2\sin\phi\,d\rho\,d\phi\,d\theta.
$$

## Vector calculus

$$
\int_C F\cdot dr=\int_a^b F(r(t))\cdot r'(t)\,dt.
$$

$$
\nabla\cdot F=P_x+Q_y+R_z.
$$

Green's theorem:

$$
\oint_C P\,dx+Q\,dy=\iint_D(Q_x-P_y)\,dA.
$$

Stokes' theorem:

$$
\oint_{\partial S} F\cdot dr=\iint_S(\nabla\times F)\cdot n\,dS.
$$

Divergence theorem:

$$
\iint_{\partial E}F\cdot n\,dS=\iiint_E\nabla\cdot F\,dV.
$$
